questionHtml: Deduce, with a reason, whether the relative brain mass is a good indicator of brain development.
markschemeHtml:
a. not a good indicator because it depends on body mass ✔

b. not a good indicator as less developed organisms show a larger relative brain mass ✔

Accept answers referring to specific organisms shown

meta.title: Deduce, with a reason, whether the relative brain mass is a good indicator of brain development.
